message:
feat: consolidate prime SSOT section replacement into canonical ReplaceSection (bd-jfe5)

Create agents.ReplaceSection(content, profile) as the single canonical
function for replacing beads integration sections. Both init_agent.go
(upgradeBeadsSection) and setup/agents.go (updateBeadsSectionWithProfile)
now delegate to it.

Key changes:
- Hash-based freshness check skips rewrite when content is current
- Returns error on malformed markers (missing/reversed) instead of
  silent append
- Marker format now includes v:1 version field for forward compat
- atomicWriteFile accepts optional permissions param (default 0644)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
